description: Seed manifest for bulk AI-Paths legacy compatibility pruning; used by check-canonical and bulk-prune scanner.

rules.description: AI Paths settings sanitizer must parse edges using canonical from/fromPort only.
Loaded-path sanitizer must parse edges using canonical from/fromPort only.
Semantic grammar conversion must remain canonical-only for edge shape.

requiredSnippets: const toEdgeToNodeId = (edge: Edge): string => (typeof edge.to === 'string' ? edge.to.trim() : '');

rules.description: Parameter inference target-path sanitizers must use canonical unsupported channel.

forbiddenSnippets: AI Path config contains deprecated parameter inference target path.
requiredSnippets: AI Path config contains unsupported parameter inference target path.

replacements.from: AI Path config contains deprecated parameter inference target path.
replacements.to: AI Path config contains unsupported parameter inference target path.

forbiddenSnippets: AI Path config contains deprecated parameter inference target path.
requiredSnippets: AI Path config contains unsupported parameter inference target path.

replacements.from: AI Path config contains deprecated parameter inference target path.
replacements.to: AI Path config contains unsupported parameter inference target path.

rules.description: Database template context must not reintroduce catalogId alias compatibility helpers.
Database input resolution must read canonical catalogId only.
Database runtime provider metadata must use requestedProvider/resolvedProvider only (no fallback/provider aliases).
DB action payload metadata must not include legacy provider alias key.
DB action request contract must reject query/updates aliases and use canonical filter/update flow.
Database client must route through canonical db-action endpoint and canonical payload keys.
API client must use canonical CSRF helper naming only.
DB schema node config must reject deprecated provider 'all' alias.
Entity update handler must reject simpleParameters alias under canonical unsupported semantics.

forbiddenSnippets: AI Paths product update payload contains deprecated "simpleParameters". Use "parameters".
requiredSnippets: AI Paths product update payload contains unsupported "simpleParameters" alias. Use "parameters".

replacements.from: AI Paths product update payload contains deprecated "simpleParameters". Use "parameters".
replacements.to: AI Paths product update payload contains unsupported "simpleParameters" alias. Use "parameters".

rules.description: Database settings edit flow must pin parameter-inference targetPath to canonical parameters path.
Starter workflow registry must parse edges from canonical edge keys only.
Core edge-shape helpers must not reintroduce source/target alias cleanup paths.
Parameter inference runtime guard must enforce canonical targetPath=parameters semantics.

forbiddenSnippets:
if (targetPath !== 'parameters') {
    return { updates: args.updates, applied: false };
requiredSnippets: Parameter inference guard targetPath must use canonical "parameters" path.

rules.description: Database schemaSnapshot/provider='all' must remain on canonical unsupported error channels.

requiredSnippets: AI Path trigger payload contains unsupported database schemaSnapshot.
AI Path trigger payload contains unsupported database query provider "all".
AI Path config contains unsupported database schemaSnapshot.
AI Path config contains unsupported database query provider "all".
AI Path config contains unsupported database schemaSnapshot.
AI Path config contains unsupported database query provider "all".

rules.description: Trigger-data and collection-alias channels must remain canonical unsupported reason/message values.

forbiddenSnippets: AI Path config contains deprecated collection aliases.
requiredSnippets: AI Path config contains unsupported collection aliases.

replacements.from: AI Path config contains deprecated collection aliases.
replacements.to: AI Path config contains unsupported collection aliases.

forbiddenSnippets: AI Path config contains deprecated collection aliases.
requiredSnippets: AI Path config contains unsupported collection aliases.

replacements.from: AI Path config contains deprecated collection aliases.
replacements.to: AI Path config contains unsupported collection aliases.

rules.description: Runtime identity and node-identity channels must remain canonical unsupported reason values.
Simulation runtime must resolve graph edges via canonical from/to endpoints only.
Settings handler must enforce canonical versioned-key guard semantics.
Maintenance handler payload schema must derive action enum from maintenance constants.
Trigger-buttons API client must expose canonical delete/reorder contract only.
Presets context must remain on canonical preset collection normalization path.
Validation defaults must not reintroduce legacy schema-version fallback branches.
Settings backup payload parser must stay on canonical key/schema shape.
Validation path-index parser must avoid legacy fallback-meta merge flow.
Validation collection-map parsing must require canonical ':' delimiter only.
Validation docs-sources parsing must remain canonical newline-delimited.
Database node normalization must not reintroduce legacy dbQuery compatibility aliases.
Collection-name canonicalization must remain on canonical alias-issue detection path.
Run execution metadata parsing must use canonical executionMode channels only.
Run source metadata parsing must remain canonical source-string only.
Run enqueue metadata must enforce canonical source string guard and no sourceInfo alias.
Run repository source filters must remain canonical meta.source-only across Prisma and Mongo.
Query invalidation source parsing must remain canonical source-only for queue cache.
Shared run-source helpers must expose canonical values/value-guard surface only.
Runtime engine retry flow must not reintroduce legacy enabled compatibility parsing.
Runtime engine halt control must not reintroduce legacy control alias shape.
Settings persistence/path actions must reject legacy runMode='queue' alias checks.
Path run service requestId lookup must remain canonical provider-safe pathless filter.

forbiddenSnippets: Provider-safe fallback when JSON-path filtering on meta is unavailable.

rules.description: Runtime node status handling must not include paused/dead_lettered legacy aliases.
Database node query normalization must remain canonical without legacy-provider compatibility shims.
Graph port normalization must not reintroduce legacy alias compatibility branches.
Path-save raw-message patterns must stay canonical and avoid legacy/deprecated compatibility wording.
Validation docs fallback manifest naming must remain on BUILTIN channels only.
Portable engine path-config migration warning channel must remain canonical and avoid legacy wording.

forbiddenSnippets: Legacy path config payload upgraded to portable package v1.
requiredSnippets: Path config payload upgraded to portable package v1.

rules.description: Runtime source must not reintroduce legacy ai_paths_validation_v1 key usage.
Runtime source must not reintroduce legacy ai_paths_index_v1 key usage.
Runtime source must not reintroduce forbidden legacy maintenance action ids.
Legacy trigger->fetcher migration module must remain removed from runtime source.
Runtime source must not reintroduce trigger->fetcher migration compatibility tokens.
Runtime source must not reintroduce legacy db-query provider migration tokens.
Feature-level duplicate run-sources helper module must remain removed.
Legacy db-command/db-query/db-update shim files must stay removed while db-action files remain present.
Maintenance action ids constant must remain the canonical exact action-id list.
Node identity/factory stable hash seeding must preserve legacy-named object keys for deterministic id continuity.
Trigger normalization database-config guard helper must remain on canonical unsupported naming channel.
Run-enqueued browser notification must stay on canonical ai-path-run-enqueued + entityType/entityId payload contract.
Portable-engine path_config edge normalization must not reintroduce source/target/sourceHandle/targetHandle alias upgrade fallback.
